glosses.vi: thống kê; số liệu thống kê

sentences.target: Ich studiere Statistik an der Uni.

translations.de: Ich studiere Statistik an der Uni.
translations.en: I study statistics at the university.
translations.vi: Tôi học thống kê ở trường đại học.
translations.nl: Ik studeer statistiek aan de universiteit.
translations.hi: मैं विश्वविद्यालय में सांख्यिकी पढ़ता हूँ.
translations.ja: 大学で統計学を勉強しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 1st sg); predicates the action; governs the direct object 'Statistik' and the locative PP 'an der Uni'.
Common noun, singular; bare accusative direct object denoting the field of study.
Preposition governing dative; introduces the locative PP 'an der Uni'.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Uni' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'an' (oblique/locative).

sentences.target: Laut Statistik steigen die Mieten weiter.

translations.de: Laut Statistik steigen die Mieten weiter.
translations.en: According to statistics, rents keep rising.
translations.es: Según las estadísticas, los alquileres siguen subiendo.
translations.fr: Selon les statistiques, les loyers continuent d’augmenter.
translations.it: Secondo le statistiche, gli affitti continuano a salire.
translations.ko: 통계에 따르면 임대료가 계속 오르고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 统计数据显示，房租还在不断上涨。
translations.yue: 統計顯示，租金仲喺度升緊。
translations.pt: Segundo as estatísticas, os aluguéis continuam subindo.
translations.he: לפי הסטטיסטיקה, שכר הדירה ממשיך לעלות.
translations.tr: İstatistiklere göre kiralar artmaya devam ediyor.
translations.vi: Theo thống kê, tiền thuê nhà vẫn tiếp tục tăng.
translations.ar: بحسب الإحصاءات، الإيجارات مستمرة في الارتفاع.
translations.nl: Volgens de statistieken blijven de huren stijgen.
translations.uk: За статистикою оренда й далі дорожчає.
translations.hu: A statisztikák szerint a lakbérek tovább emelkednek.
translations.hi: आंकड़ों के अनुसार किराए लगातार बढ़ रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σύμφωνα με τα στατιστικά, τα ενοίκια συνεχίζουν να αυξάνονται.
translations.nb: Ifølge statistikken fortsetter leiene å øke.
translations.id: Menurut statistik, harga sewa terus naik.
translations.sv: Enligt statistiken fortsätter hyrorna att stiga.
translations.ro: Conform statisticilor, chiriile continuă să crească.
translations.da: Ifølge statistikken bliver huslejen ved med å stige.
translations.ja: 統計によると、家賃は引き続き上がっています。

tokens.explanation: Preposition meaning 'according to'; takes a (often articleless) NP complement; heads the PP 'laut Statistik'.
Common noun used bare after 'laut'; complement of the preposition, referring to the statistical data/source.
Finite verb (present indicative, 3rd pl); main predicate with 'die Mieten' as nominative subject.
Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Mieten' (subject).
Common noun, plural; nominative subject of 'steigen'.
Adverb indicating continuation; modifies the verb 'steigen'.

sentences.target: Ich erstelle eine Statistik für die Chefin.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ɛɐ̯ˈʃtɛlə ˈaɪ̯nə ʃtaˈtɪstɪk fyːɐ̯ diː ˈʃɛfɪn/

translations.de: Ich erstelle eine Statistik für die Chefin.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ɛɐ̯ˈʃtɛlə ˈaɪ̯nə ʃtaˈtɪstɪk fyːɐ̯ diː ˈʃɛfɪn/
translations.en: I'm preparing a statistical report for the boss.
translations.es: Estoy preparando un informe estadístico para la jefa.
translations.fr: Je prépare un rapport statistique pour la patronne.
translations.it: Sto preparando un rapporto statistico per la responsabile.
translations.ko: 상사에게 제출할 통계 보고서를 준비하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在给女老板做一份统计报告。
translations.yue: 我幫女上司整緊份統計報告。
translations.ru: Я готовлю статистический отчёт для начальницы.
translations.pt: Estou preparando um relatório estatístico para a chefe.
translations.tr: Patron hanım için istatistik raporu hazırlıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chuẩn bị báo cáo thống kê cho sếp.
translations.nl: Ik maak een statistisch rapport voor mijn baas.
translations.uk: Я готую статистичний звіт для начальниці.
translations.hi: मैं बॉस के लिए एक सांख्यिकीय रिपोर्ट तैयार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ετοιμάζω μια στατιστική αναφορά για τη διευθύντρια.
translations.nb: Jeg lager en statistisk rapport til sjefen.
translations.id: Saya menyiapkan laporan statistik untuk atasan.
translations.sv: Jag tar fram en statistisk rapport till chefen.
translations.ro: Pregătesc un raport statistic pentru șefă.
translations.da: Jeg laver en statistisk rapport til chefen.
translations.ja: 上司のために統計報告書を作成しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (present indicative, 1st sg); selects a direct object and a beneficiary PP.
Indefinite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Statistik' (direct object).
Common noun, singular; accusative direct object of 'erstelle'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces the beneficiary PP.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Chefin' within the PP.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'für' (beneficiary/addressee).

sentences.target: Die Statistik im Bericht wirkt veraltet.

translations.de: Die Statistik im Bericht wirkt veraltet.
translations.en: The statistics in the report seem outdated.
translations.es: Las estadísticas del informe parecen desactualizadas.
translations.fr: Les statistiques du rapport semblent dépassées.
translations.it: Le statistiche nel rapporto sembrano superate.
translations.zh-Hans: 报告里的统计看起来过时了。
translations.yue: 報告入面嘅統計睇落好似過時咗。
translations.pt: As estatísticas do relatório parecem desatualizadas.
translations.vi: Các số liệu thống kê trong báo cáo có vẻ lỗi thời.
translations.nl: De statistieken in het rapport lijken verouderd.
translations.hu: A jelentésben szereplő statisztikák elavultnak tűnnek.
translations.hi: रिपोर्ट के आँकड़े पुराने लगते हैं.
translations.pl: Statystyki w raporcie wydają się przestarzałe.
translations.el: Τα στατιστικά στην έκθεση φαίνονται ξεπερασμένα.
translations.id: Statistik dalam laporan itu terlihat usang.
translations.ja: 報告書の統計は古く見えます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject 'Statistik'.
Common noun, singular; head of the subject NP.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing the locative PP modifying 'Statistik'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'im' (locative complement).
Finite verb (present indicative, 3rd sg); copular-like use meaning 'seems/appears', taking a predicative complement.
Adjective used predicatively as subject complement after 'wirkt'.

es: Según las estadísticas, los alquileres siguen subiendo.
Estoy preparando un informe estadístico para la jefa.
Las estadísticas del informe parecen desactualizadas.

Je prépare un rapport statistique pour la patronne.
Les statistiques du rapport semblent dépassées.

Le statistiche nel rapporto sembrano superate.

상사에게 제출할 통계 보고서를 준비하고 있어요.

我幫女上司整緊份統計報告。
報告入面嘅統計睇落好似過時咗。

Estou preparando um relatório estatístico para a chefe.
As estatísticas do relatório parecem desatualizadas.

Volgens de statistieken blijven de huren stijgen.
Ik maak een statistisch rapport voor mijn baas.

hu: A statisztikák szerint a lakbérek tovább emelkednek.
A jelentésben szereplő statisztikák elavultnak tűnnek.

आंकड़ों के अनुसार किराए लगातार बढ़ रहे हैं.

रिपोर्ट के आँकड़े पुराने लगते हैं.
